allow: PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command vercel -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "vercel: not installed" }; try { \(Get-Command supabase -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "supabase: not installed" })

PowerShell($h = @{ apikey = 'sb_publishable_FmWlFyKw7d1AELizMcFh4A_5OrcIzgP'; Prefer = 'return=minimal' }; $body = '{"id": 1, "name": "__connection_test__"}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'https://wvwxmsivdecfavxdadgo.supabase.co/rest/v1/re_properties' -Headers $h -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -ErrorAction Stop; "INSERT OK" } catch { "INSERT FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method Delete -Uri 'https://wvwxmsivdecfavxdadgo.supabase.co/rest/v1/re_properties?id=eq.1' -Headers $h -ErrorAction Stop; "DELETE OK" } catch { "DELETE FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://greyhaven-real-estate.vercel.app' -Method Get -MaximumRedirection 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'GREYHAVEN REAL ESTATE'\) { "CONTENT: Greyhaven app served" } else { "CONTENT: unexpected page" }; if \($r.Content -match 'wvwxmsivdecfavxdadgo'\) { "note: config inline" } } catch { "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $c = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://greyhaven-real-estate.vercel.app/js/config.js' -ErrorAction Stop; if \($c.Content -match 'wvwxmsivdecfavxdadgo'\) { "CONFIG: latest commit deployed \(Supabase URL present\)" } else { "CONFIG: STALE — Supabase URL missing, deploy predates the config push" } } catch { "CONFIG CHECK FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($key = 'AIzaSyDjOEwtvOAPZ3ViC8mYXYb2aVtHY5kvJr0'; $base = 'https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/greyhaven-real-estate/databases/\(default\)/documents'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$base/re_properties?key=$key" -ErrorAction Stop; "ANON READ: OK \(expected\)" } catch { "ANON READ: BLOCKED — $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) \(rules may not be published\)" }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "$base/re_properties?documentId=999&key=$key" -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"fields":{"name":{"stringValue":"__test__"}}}' -ErrorAction Stop; "ANON WRITE: SUCCEEDED — RULES NOT ENFORCING, CHECK PUBLISH" } catch { "ANON WRITE: REJECTED \(expected\) — $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })

PowerShell($key = 'AIzaSyDjOEwtvOAPZ3ViC8mYXYb2aVtHY5kvJr0'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signUp?key=$key" -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"email":"__setup_test__@editors.greyhaven.local","password":"test123456","returnSecureToken":true}' -ErrorAction Stop; "SIGNUP: OK — Email/Password is enabled"; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:delete?key=$key" -ContentType 'application/json' -Body \('{"idToken":"' + $r.idToken + '"}'\) -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; "CLEANUP: test account deleted" } catch { "CLEANUP FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } catch { $msg = ''; try { $msg = \($_.ErrorDetails.Message | ConvertFrom-Json\).error.message } catch {}; "SIGNUP FAILED: $msg — Email/Password provider likely not enabled yet" })
